member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.ConfigurationHandle
member.summary: Handler for task related to configuration file.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.ConfigurationHandle.sessionContext
member.summary: Session context.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.ConfigurationHandle.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Configuration,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Deserialized configuration json content to process.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.ConfigurationHandle.ValidatePowerSumPinNamesExist
member.summary: Check PowerSumPinsSetting PinName exist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.ConfigurationHandle.PopulateTestInstancesWithRegex
member.summary: Get all test instances from test plan and populate TestInstancesToApply with regex.
member.exception: No test instance matching regex found.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.ConfigurationHandle.CheckForDuplicateTestInstancesToApply
member.summary: Check for duplicate TestInstancesToApply across PowerSumPinsSetting object. One pin object can have multiple test regex, but it should not have duplicate test instance names. e.g. PinA has TestRegex1 and TestRegex2, but both regex should not match the same test instance name. Multiple pin objects cannot have duplicated test instance names. e.g. PinA has TestRegex1 and PinB has TestRegex2, but both regex should not match the same test instance name.
member.exception: Duplicate test found among pin setting.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.ConfigurationHandle.CalculatePSFBase
member.summary: Evaluate PSF Equation and set PSF Base.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.ConfigurationHandle.CalculateTestPSFToApply
member.summary: Calculates and applies the Power Sum Factor (PSF) for each test in the configuration.
member.remarks: This method iterates through the configured power sum pin settings and calculates the PSF to apply for each test based on the base PSF value and the test-specific multiplier. The calculated PSF is then assigned to the corresponding test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.ConfigurationHandle.ValidateTestPSFToApply
member.summary: Check Tests PSF Multiplier within range.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.TestToApply
member.summary: This class is structure for TestToApply object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.TestToApply.TestInstanceName
member.summary: Gets the test instance name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.TestToApply.PinName
member.summary: Gets the pin name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Common.TestToApply.PSFToApply
member.summary: Gets the PSF value to apply. It is calculated by multiplying the PSFMultiplier with the PSF Equation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Configuration
member.summary: This class is structure for configurations object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Configuration.PSF
member.summary: Gets or sets PSF object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Configuration.PowerSumPinsSetting
member.summary: Gets or sets list of power sum pins setting.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.ConfigurationJsonFile
member.summary: This class represent the configuration data structure for json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.ConfigurationJsonFile.Configuration
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration. Only single configuration per file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.PowerSumPinSetting
member.summary: This class is structure for power sum pin setting object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.PowerSumPinSetting.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets pin name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.PowerSumPinSetting.Tests
member.summary: Gets or sets list of test setting.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.PowerSumPinSetting.PinScope
member.summary: Gets or sets pin scope. This information will be set by the test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.PSF
member.summary: This class is structure for Power Scale Factor (PSF) object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.PSF.Equation
member.summary: Gets or sets equation to calculate base PSF.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.PSF.HighLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets maximum PSF. Value is validated with json schema with maximum allowed PSF of 10.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.PSF.LowLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets minimum PSF. Value is validated with json schema with minimum allowed PSF of 0.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.PSF.PSFBase
member.summary: Gets or sets PSF Base that calculated with equation. This information will be set by the test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Test
member.summary: This class is structure for Test object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Test.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets test type.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Test.Regex
member.summary: Gets or sets test regex. This will be use to get matching test instance names.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Test.PSFMultiplier
member.summary: Gets or sets PSF multiplier. This will be use to multiply the calculated PSF Equation. Value is validated with json schema with range [0.0, 10.0].

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Test.TestInstancesToApply
member.summary: Gets or sets the test instances that match the regex. This information will be set by the test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.InputFile.Test.PSFToApply
member.summary: Gets or sets the PSF to apply for test instance. This information will be set by the test method. PSFToApply is calculated by multiplying the PSFMultiplier with the PSF Equation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.PrimeDevicePowerScalerTestMethod
member.summary: This is Prime DevicePowerScaler Test Method Verify and Execute.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.PrimeDevicePowerScalerTestMethod.configurationHandle
member.summary: Configuration handle.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.PrimeDevicePowerScalerTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigurationFile. Can be use with variable "~HDMT_TPL_DIR".

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator
member.summary: Validate the Json file has the correct format.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator.SchemaFilePathEnvironmentVariableName
member.summary: This is Test Program Environment Variable that set as "$PRIME_VERSION_DIR\resources\schemas".

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator.SchemaFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the Schema file path for this TM.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator.ErrorList
member.summary: Gets or sets the error list from the schema validation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator.ValidateFile(System.String)
member.summary: Executes the validation for json file with the json schema. Adds validation errors to a common list.
member.param: The json file path to be validate.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator.GetValidatedConfiguration
member.summary: Get Configuration object that construct with Configuration json file and validated with json schema.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator.GetJsonFileContent(System.String)
member.summary: Get the content of a json file with filesystem.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator.GetSchemaValidator(System.String)
member.summary: Get schema validator instance with rule defined in json schema file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.DevicePowerScaler.Schema.JsonSchemaValidator.GetErrorDetails
member.summary: Gets all the validation errors detail as a string.
